category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ChinaDNS as querying local and foreign DNS servers to address DNS poisoning behavior.
source_facts.description says ChinaDNS-C is a C port of ChinaDNS that fixes DNS irregularities in China.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a C port of ChinaDNS.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, options, and advanced behavior.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/shadowsocks/ChinaDNS, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README usage text says it forwards DNS requests and protects against DNS poisoning.
source_facts.description identifies a C port for DNS irregularities.
